problems.title: 创建简单视图
problems.description: 创建一个视图，显示学生的姓名和年龄。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 CREATE VIEW 创建视图。
problems.answer: CREATE VIEW student_view AS SELECT name, age FROM students;
problems.judgeRule: 检查视图是否创建成功

problems.title: 查询视图
problems.description: 查询刚才创建的 student_view 视图。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 SELECT 查询视图。

problems.title: 创建带条件的视图
problems.description: 创建一个视图，只显示男生的信息。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 创建视图时使用 WHERE 条件。
problems.answer: CREATE VIEW male_student_view AS SELECT * FROM students WHERE gender = '男';
problems.expectedResult: 带条件的视图创建成功
problems.judgeRule: 检查带条件的视图是否创建成功

problems.title: 创建连接视图
problems.description: 创建一个视图，连接学生表和班级表，显示学生姓名和班级名称。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 创建视图时使用 JOIN 连接多张表。
problems.answer: CREATE VIEW student_class_view AS SELECT s.name AS student_name, c.name AS class_name FROM students s INNER JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id;
problems.judgeRule: 检查连接视图是否创建成功

problems.title: 创建聚合视图
problems.description: 创建一个视图，显示每个班级的学生人数。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

problems.requirement: 创建视图时使用 GROUP BY 和聚合函数。
problems.answer: CREATE VIEW class_student_count AS SELECT class_id, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students GROUP BY class_id;
problems.judgeRule: 检查聚合视图是否创建成功

problems.title: 修改视图
problems.description: 修改已存在的视图，添加更多字段。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW 修改视图。
problems.answer: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW student_view AS SELECT id, name, age, gender FROM students;
problems.judgeRule: 检查视图是否修改成功

problems.title: 查看视图定义
problems.description: 查看 student_view 视图的定义。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT)

problems.requirement: 使用 SHOW CREATE VIEW 查看视图定义。
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否能查看视图定义

problems.title: 删除视图

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT)

problems.requirement: 使用 DROP VIEW 删除视图。
problems.judgeRule: 检查视图是否删除成功

problems.title: 更新视图数据
problems.description: 通过视图更新基表数据（简单视图）。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT)

problems.requirement: 通过 UPDATE 视图来更新基表数据。
problems.answer: UPDATE student_view SET age = 21 WHERE id = 1;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否通过视图更新了基表

problems.title: 创建复杂视图
problems.description: 创建一个复杂视图，包含连接、聚合和筛选。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 创建一个包含 JOIN、GROUP BY、聚合函数和 WHERE 的复杂视图。
problems.answer: CREATE VIEW class_gender_stats AS SELECT c.name AS class_name, s.gender, COUNT(*) AS count FROM students s INNER JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, s.gender;
problems.judgeRule: 检查复杂视图是否创建成功
